name: Dave & Buster's Entertainment, Inc.
summary: PART I Dave & Busters Entertainment, Inc. (D&B Entertainment) is the owner and operator of 243 venues in North America that offer premier entertainment and dining experiences for both adults and families under the Dave & Buster's and Main Event brands. As of February3, 2026, the Company had 179 Dave & Busters branded stores in 43 states, Puerto Rico, and Canada that offer guests the opportunity to Eat Drink Play and Watch, all in one location. Each store offers a full menu of entres and appetize...
